headline: BJ’s takes on Costco with major expansion
summary: The warehouse club space has quietly become one of the most competitive corners of retail — and one of the fastest-growing. Data from Placer.ai show just how strong the trend is. Warehouse clubs posted steady year-over-year foot traffic gains in 2025, with visits rising roughly 6% at Costco, ...

headline: Mama’s Creations (MAMA) Fuels Confidence Following Q4 Outperformance
summary: Mama’s Creations Inc. (NASDAQ:MAMA) is one of the 10 oversold small cap stocks to buy now. On April 16, DA Davidson increased the price target on Mama’s Creations Inc. (NASDAQ:MAMA) from $24 to $25, resulting in an adjusted upside of almost 73%. The firm also maintained a Buy rating on the stock based on its […]
